name: agency-starter
description: AI-first WordPress agency starter — frontend toolchain (block build, linting, e2e/visual/accessibility tests).

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css

//overrides: Dev-only security overrides for advisories in @wordpress/scripts' transitive tree. Production audit (npm audit --omit=dev) is already clean; these force patched versions of build-tooling deps that process repo/PR content. Every override here is verified to keep `npm ci` lock-sync, lint, and a byte-identical block build green (webpack-dev-server + uuid additionally verified by booting `npm run start`). Regenerate the lock with `npx -y npm@10 install` (see AGENTS.md). DROPPED, not fixable safely: minimatch — the only vulnerable copy (3.0.8) is pinned by markdownlint-cli via `~3.0.5`, and npm@10 refuses to force it to a patched 3.1.x (both nested and `minimatch@<3.1.4` version-selector overrides leave it 'invalid' at 3.0.8), while a bare tree-wide `minimatch` override would destructively downgrade the 9.x/10.x minimatch that eslint and webpack tooling require. The 3 residual highs (minimatch, markdownlint-cli, @wordpress/scripts) all chain to that single dev-only, never-invoked minimatch.
